full_text:
Lady Xun
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lady Xun. Mother of Xu Shu, she killed herself when her son defected to Wei. Lady Xun was affiliated with the Han Dynasty and the Shu Kingdom.
